name: Yummy Yogurt Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease baking sheet with Crisco Shortening.
2. Combine flour, baking powder and salt.
3. Cream Crisco Shortening, sugars, egg, yogurt, honey and vanilla in a large bowl on medium speed of electric mixer just until smoothly blended.
4. Add flour mixture on low speed, mixing until smooth. Stir in chocolate chips and nuts.
5. Drop dough by spoonfuls onto prepared baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 9-11 minutes, or until set and very lightly browned. Cool 2 minutes, then remove to cooling rack. About 5 dozen cookies. Freezing:
ExcellentVariations:
1. Peanut butter chips and peanuts.
2. Butterscotch chips.
3. Toffee bits.
